delta.text: I
'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm the current state.

content.text: I'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm the current state.
请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

delta.text: I
'm on the home screen. I can see the Settings (设置) app. Let me open
it.

delta.text: I'm in
Settings. I can see "蓝牙" (Bluetooth) showing "已开启" (enabled). Let me tap
on it to enter the Bluetooth settings page.

delta.text: I'm on
the Bluetooth settings page. The Bluetooth toggle is currently ON (blue). I need to tap the
toggle to turn it off.

content.text: I'm on the Bluetooth settings page. The Bluetooth toggle is currently ON (blue). I need to tap the toggle to turn it off.

delta.text: The
Bluetooth toggle is still ON (blue). The ai_click might have missed
the toggle. Let me use the XML approach to get the exact position
of the toggle switch.

content.text: The Bluetooth toggle is still ON (blue). The ai_click might have missed the toggle. Let me use the XML approach to get the exact position of the toggle switch.
